metadata.description: Self-updating multi-platform paid advertising audit and optimization plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-ads
plugins.description: Self-updating multi-platform paid advertising audit, optimization, and AI creative generation. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, and Apple Ads with weighted scoring, parallel agents, industry templates, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, and /ads update for refreshing platform references.
